en: I'm an immortal. Special today is blueberry waffles.
Why are you telling me this? Because I want you to believe in me.
You're not a god. You can take my word for it.
ko: 너는 신이 아니야. 내 말 믿어도 돼.

en: This is 12 years of Catholic school talking. I could come back if you're not ready.
How do you know I'm not a god? Oh, please.
ko: 내가 신이 아니라는 걸 어떻게 알아?

en: How do you know? Because it's not possible.
ko: 그건 불가능해. 나는 다시 올 거야.

en: Her brother-in-law, Carl, owns this diner. She's worked here since she was 17.
ko: 그녀의 형부인 칼이 이 다이너를 운영해.

en: More than anything else in her life, she wants to see Paris before she dies.
Oh, boy, what a... What are you doing?
This is Debbie Kleiser and her fiancé, Fred. Do I know you?
ko: 이 사람은 데비 클라이저와 그녀의 약혼자 프레드야.

en: They're supposed to be getting married this afternoon, but Debbie is having second thoughts. What?
ko: 내가 너를 아는 건가? 그들은 오늘 오후에 결혼할 예정이야.

en: Lovely ring. This is Bill. He's been a waiter for three years since he left Penn State and had to get work.
He likes the town, he paints toy soldiers, and he's gay.
I am. This is Gus. He hates his life here.
